cleavage agent: the peptides were analyzed by nano-LC-MS/MS... digested with 4 μg trypsin.
collision energy: collision energy (CE) of 30 V (15 MS/MS events with product-ion accumulation time of 50 ms each).
enrichment method: Solid-phase extraction (SPE) with styrene divinyl benzene polymer type sorbents (Varian PPL) for bloom DOM enrichment.
instrument: coupled to Triple TOF 6600 (Q-TOF, AB Sciex).
ionization type: Electrospray ion source (ESI) source modified conditions were as follows.
labeling: the proteomic analysis revealed that more than 50% of the predicted genes were expressed in each COG functional group.
